titleStmt.title: SII 33.93: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 93. (A.R. No. 15 of 1948.) Kummetta, Tadpatri Taluk, Anantapur District.

summary.p: Slab lying near the dhvajastambha of the Chennakēśava temple.
This is dated Śaka 1475, Pramādīcha, Śrāvaṇa ba. 15, Thursday corresponding to 1553 A.D. August 9 Wednesday °33.

Records the gift of land as Sarvamānya to the god Chennakēśava for providing food offerings and also for the merit of 24 castes in the village Kummetta surnamed as Virapratāpa Krishṇarāyapuram situated in the Pennabaḍi-māgāṇi in the Jagatāpati-Gutti-sīma by Chintayya, son of Chennāreḍḍi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayābhyuda
ya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1475
Agunēṭi pramādica saṁvatsara śrāvaṇa ba 1
5 gu śrīmahādrā(rā)jādhirāja paramēśva
ra śrīvīrapratāpa śrī sadāsivadēvamahārā
yalu vidyānagaramaṁdu vajra
siṁhāsarārūḍhuṁḍai pṛthivī sāmrājyaṁ
cēyucuṁḍaṁgānu jagatāpi guttisīma
lōni peṁnabaḍi māgāṇiku cellē ku
mmēttaku pratināmamaina vīrapratā
pa kṛṣṇarāyapuraṁ sa¨rvamānyaṁ
Agrahāramaṁdu ceṁnnakēśavarāya
riki doṁmari Iruvainālugu kulāla
vāriki puṇyaṁgānu liṁgamane nā
yuḍuṁnigāri komāruṁḍu ceṁnnāreḍi ko
māruṁḍu ciṁtayyanugārijē Iccina dha¨rmma
śāsanakramameṭlaṁnnanu kummēta grāmana
mā Iruvai nālugu kulālavāri
doṁmari ṁnu cennakēśavarāya
riki Amṛtapaḷaku nadi Akṣarālā
Āru vūḍlalunnu sama¨rpistimi I
I da¨rmānaku yāvaṁḍu tappinānu
mā Iruvainālugu kulālavāṁḍu
pāpana bōvuvāru I dāravosi
tappinavāru go
Iruvainālugu kulālavāri
puṇyaṁgānu Ācaṁdrā¨rkāsthāI
gānu kummēta ceṁnnakēśavarāyani Amṛtapa
ḷaku sama¨rpistimi Ani vrāsiccina dha¨rmaśā
sanaṁ śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 33.93 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
